vba.title: 第一題：多張帳單匯入總表
vba.question: 如何將多報表一次匯入總表，並且不覆蓋過往明細資料
vba.prompt: 我想要撰寫一段 Excel VBA 程式碼，可以讓使用者選取多個 Excel 帳單檔案，並且自動將這些帳單的內容一次匯入到名為「總表」的工作表中，如果「總表」不存在則自動建立它（並建立 A 到 H 欄的標頭欄位）。請注意，匯入時必須以 「總表」的 C 欄 為基準，從最下方（最後一行）開始新增，不能覆蓋過往已經匯入的明細資料。此外，複製時是複製來源檔案的 A2 到 E 欄，並對應貼到總表的 C 到 G 欄。
vba.code:
Option Explicit

Sub ImportMultipleBillFilesToCtoG()
    Dim fd As FileDialog
    Dim selectedFile As Variant
    Dim wbSource As Workbook
    Dim wsSource As Worksheet
    Dim wsSummary As Worksheet
    
    Dim sourceLastRow As Long
    Dim summaryNextRow As Long
    Dim copyRange As Range
    
    ' 關閉螢幕更新與警告訊息，提升執行速度
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.DisplayAlerts = False
    
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    '=================================================
    ' 1. 檢查或建立「總表」工作表
    '=================================================
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsSummary = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("總表")
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    ' 如果找不到「總表」，就自動建立一個
    If wsSummary Is Nothing Then
        Set wsSummary = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets.Add(Before:=ThisWorkbook.Worksheets(1))
        wsSummary.Name = "總表"
        
        ' 建立初始的欄位名稱（C-G 欄為匯入目標，A-B 與 H 欄可依需求調整）
        wsSummary.Range("A1:H1").Value = Array( _
            "帳單月份", "帳單銀行", "刷卡日期", "入帳起息日", _
            "消費明細", "新台幣金額", "消費地區", "消費分類")
    End If
    
    '=================================================
    ' 2. 讓使用者選擇多個 Excel 帳單檔案
    '=================================================
    Set fd = Application.FileDialog(msoFileDialogFilePicker)
    With fd
        .Title = "請選擇要匯入的信用卡帳單（可多選）"
        .AllowMultiSelect = True
        .Filters.Clear
        .Filters.Add "Excel 檔案", "*.xlsx; *.xlsm; *.xls"
        
        If .Show <> -1 Then
            MsgBox "已取消匯入作業。", vbInformation
            GoTo SafeExit
        End If
    End With
    
    '=================================================
    ' 3. 逐一開啟選取的檔案並匯入資料至 C ~ G 欄
    '=================================================
    For Each selectedFile In fd.SelectedItems
        
        ' 開啟來源帳單活頁簿（唯讀模式）
        Set wbSource = Workbooks.Open(selectedFile, ReadOnly:=True)
        Set wsSource = wbSource.Sheets(1)
        
        ' 尋找來源帳單的最後一行
        sourceLastRow = wsSource.Cells(wsSource.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
        
        ' 如果有實際資料才執行
        If sourceLastRow >= 2 Then
            
            ' 每次複製前，動態計算「總表」目前的最後一行（以 C 欄是否有資料為基準）
            summaryNextRow = wsSummary.Cells(wsSummary.Rows.Count, 3).End(xlUp).Row + 1
            
            ' 【修正處 1】調整複製範圍：改為 A2 到 E 欄（共 5 個欄位）
            Set copyRange = wsSource.Range("A2:E" & sourceLastRow)
            
            ' 複製來源資料
            copyRange.Copy
            
            ' 【修正處 2】貼上至總表：指定從該列的第 3 欄（C 欄）開始貼上
            ' 複製的 5 個欄位會自動順延填入 C, D, E, F, G 欄
            wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 3).PasteSpecial Paste:=xlPasteValues
            wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 3).PasteSpecial Paste:=xlPasteFormats
            
            ' 清除剪貼簿記憶體
            Application.CutCopyMode = False
        End If
        
        ' 關閉來源檔案
        wbSource.Close SaveChanges:=False
    Next selectedFile
    
    '=================================================
    ' 4. 匯入完成提示
    '=================================================
    MsgBox "所有選取的帳單資料已成功匯入至「總表」的 C 到 G 欄！", vbInformation, "匯入成功"

SafeExit:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.DisplayAlerts = True
    Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
    MsgBox "執行過程中發生錯誤: " & Err.Description, vbCritical, "錯誤提示"
    Resume SafeExit
End Sub

vba.title: 第二題：帳單檔名解析並寫入總表
vba.question: 如何將檔名邏輯一次匯入總表，並且正確配對明細資料
vba.prompt: 在匯入信用卡帳單時，我希望能從檔案名稱中自動解析出「銀行名稱」與「帳單月份」。帳單檔名的格式通常是「銀行名稱_YYYY_MM.xlsx」，例如「玉山_2025_01.xlsx」或「台新_2025_02.xlsx」。請幫我修改先前的 VBA，將解析出的銀行名稱寫入總表的「帳單銀行」（B欄），而帳單月份以「yyyymm」格式（數字型態，例如 202501，且 A 欄格式設為 General）寫入「帳單月份」（A欄），並根據每張帳單匯入的明細筆數自動向下填滿。另外，匯入後請自動將總表的 C 欄與 D 欄資料設定為靠右對齊。
vba.code:
Option Explicit

Sub IntegratedImportWithParsing()
    Dim fd As FileDialog
    Dim selectedFile As Variant
    Dim wbSource As Workbook
    Dim wsSource As Worksheet
    Dim wsSummary As Worksheet
    
    Dim sourceLastRow As Long
    Dim summaryNextRow As Long
    Dim copyRange As Range
    
    ' 宣告用來解析檔名的變數
    Dim fileName As String
    Dim fileParts As Variant
    Dim bankName As String
    Dim billMonth As Long ' 月份為 Long 數字型態
    Dim importedRowsCount As Long
    
    ' 關閉螢幕更新與警告訊息，提升執行速度
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.DisplayAlerts = False
    
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    '=================================================
    ' 1. 檢查或建立「總表」工作表
    '=================================================
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsSummary = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("總表")
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler ' 恢復正常的錯誤處理
    
    ' 如果找不到「總表」，就自動建立一個
    If wsSummary Is Nothing Then
        Set wsSummary = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets.Add(Before:=ThisWorkbook.Worksheets(1))
        wsSummary.Name = "總表"
        
        ' 建立初始的欄位名稱（A 欄預設為一般格式）
        wsSummary.Columns("A").NumberFormat = "General"
        wsSummary.Range("A1:H1").Value = Array( _
            "帳單月份", "帳單銀行", "刷卡日期", "入帳起息日", _
            "消費明細", "新台幣金額", "消費地區", "消費分類")
    End If
    
    '=================================================
    ' 2. 讓使用者選擇多個 Excel 帳單檔案
    '=================================================
    Set fd = Application.FileDialog(msoFileDialogFilePicker)
    With fd
        .Title = "請選擇要匯入的信用卡帳單（可多選）"
        .AllowMultiSelect = True ' 允許點選多個檔案
        .Filters.Clear
        .Filters.Add "Excel 檔案", "*.xlsx; *.xlsm; *.xls"
        
        ' 如果使用者點選「取消」，則退出程序
        If .Show <> -1 Then
            MsgBox "已取消匯入作業。", vbInformation
            GoTo SafeExit
        End If
    End With
    
    '=================================================
    ' 3. 逐一開啟選取的檔案、解析檔名、接續匯入資料
    '=================================================
    For Each selectedFile In fd.SelectedItems
        
        ' ----- 步驟 A：從檔案路徑解析出「銀行名稱」與「帳單月份」 -----
        fileName = Mid(selectedFile, InStrRev(selectedFile, "\") + 1)
        fileName = Left(fileName, InStrRev(fileName, ".") - 1)
        fileParts = Split(fileName, "_")
        
        bankName = fileParts(0)
        ' 用 CLng 將組合好的 "2025" 與 "01" 轉成真正的整數數字 202501
        billMonth = CLng(fileParts(1) & fileParts(2)) 
        
        ' ----- 步驟 B：開啟來源檔案並複製明細 -----
        Set wbSource = Workbooks.Open(selectedFile, ReadOnly:=True)
        Set wsSource = wbSource.Sheets(1)
        
        ' 尋找來源帳單的最後一行
        sourceLastRow = wsSource.Cells(wsSource.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
        
        ' 如果來源檔案有實際明細資料（最後一行大於等於 2）才執行
        If sourceLastRow >= 2 Then
            
            ' 每次複製前，以「總表」C 欄目前的最後一行來動態計算下一個空白行
            summaryNextRow = wsSummary.Cells(wsSummary.Rows.Count, 3).End(xlUp).Row + 1
            
            ' 設定要複製的來源範圍：抓取外部帳單的 A2 到 E 欄（共 5 個欄位）
            Set copyRange = wsSource.Range("A2:E" & sourceLastRow)
            
            ' 複製並精準貼上到總表的 C 欄（第 3 欄）開始的位置，自動填滿 C 到 G 欄
            copyRange.Copy
            wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 3).PasteSpecial Paste:=xlPasteValues
            wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 3).PasteSpecial Paste:=xlPasteFormats
            Application.CutCopyMode = False
            
            ' ----- 步驟 C：將解析好的檔名資料填入 A、B 欄 -----
            ' 計算本次總共匯入了幾筆明細
            importedRowsCount = sourceLastRow - 1
            
            ' 將目標範圍定義為「一般」數字格式，再寫入數字
            With wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 1).Resize(importedRowsCount)
                .NumberFormat = "General"
                .Value = billMonth
            End With
            
            wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 2).Resize(importedRowsCount).Value = bankName
            
            ' ----- 【新功能】將這次匯入的 C 欄與 D 欄設定為靠右對齊 -----
            ' C 欄：刷卡日期，D 欄：入帳起息日
            wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 3).Resize(importedRowsCount).HorizontalAlignment = xlRight
            wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 4).Resize(importedRowsCount).HorizontalAlignment = xlRight
            
        End If
        
        ' 關閉來源檔案，不儲存變更
        wbSource.Close SaveChanges:=False
    Next selectedFile
    
    '=================================================
    ' 4. 匯入完成提示
    '=================================================
    MsgBox "所有選取的帳單資料已成功匯入！" & vbCrLf & _
           "C 欄與 D 欄的日期資料已自動設定為靠右對齊。", vbInformation, "匯入成功"

SafeExit:
    ' 恢復環境設定
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.DisplayAlerts = True
    Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
    MsgBox "執行過程中發生錯誤: " & Err.Description, vbCritical, "錯誤提示"
    Resume SafeExit
End Sub

vba.title: 第三題：消費分類判斷並寫入總表
vba.question: 如何將消費明細與對照表配對，判斷出正確的消費分類，並匯入總表
vba.prompt:
在匯入信用卡明細時，我希望能根據消費明細中的關鍵字自動對其進行分類。我有一張獨立的「消費分類對照表」Excel 檔案，格式為 A欄：關鍵字，B欄：分類名稱。

請幫我整合先前的 VBA，在選擇帳單前，先跳出視窗讓使用者選取這張對照表檔案。匯入帳單後，程式要全面檢查總表，當對照表的 A 欄關鍵字有包含在總表的 E 欄（消費明細）中，就把對照表的 B 欄分類名稱寫入總表的 H 欄（消費分類）。

舉例：當對照表 A 欄為「蝦皮」，總表 E 欄為「蝦皮購物」，因包含該關鍵字，則在 H 欄寫入「購物」。如果整張對照表都找不到符合的關鍵字，請一律幫我填入「其他」。
vba.code:
Option Explicit

'====================================================
' 主巨集：執行多檔匯入與自動關鍵字分類
'====================================================
Sub IntegratedImportWithClassification()
    Dim fd As FileDialog
    Dim selectedFile As Variant
    Dim wbSource As Workbook
    Dim wsSource As Worksheet
    Dim wsSummary As Worksheet
    
    Dim sourceLastRow As Long
    Dim summaryNextRow As Long
    Dim copyRange As Range
    
    ' 宣告解析檔名與計算用的變數
    Dim fileName As String
    Dim fileParts As Variant
    Dim bankName As String
    Dim billMonth As Long
    Dim importedRowsCount As Long
    
    ' 宣告第三階段：關鍵字對照表相關變數
    Dim keywordPath As String
    Dim wbKeyword As Workbook
    Dim wsKeyword As Worksheet
    Dim keywordArr As Variant
    Dim keywordLastRow As Long
    
    ' 關閉螢幕更新與警告訊息，提升執行速度
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.DisplayAlerts = False
    
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    '=================================================
    ' 1. 檢查或建立「總表」工作表
    '=================================================
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsSummary = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("總表")
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    If wsSummary Is Nothing Then
        Set wsSummary = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets.Add(Before:=ThisWorkbook.Worksheets(1))
        wsSummary.Name = "總表"
        
        wsSummary.Columns("A").NumberFormat = "General"
        wsSummary.Range("A1:H1").Value = Array( _
            "帳單月份", "帳單銀行", "刷卡日期", "入帳起息日", _
            "消費明細", "新台幣金額", "消費地區", "消費分類")
    End If
    
    '=================================================
    ' 【第三階段新功能】2. 先上傳分類關鍵字對照表
    '=================================================
    Set fd = Application.FileDialog(msoFileDialogFilePicker)
    With fd
        .Title = "【第一步】請選擇「消費分類關鍵字對照表」檔案"
        .Filters.Clear
        .Filters.Add "Excel 檔案", "*.xlsx; *.xlsm; *.xls"
        
        If .Show <> -1 Then
            MsgBox "已取消作業：未選取關鍵字對照表。", vbExclamation
            GoTo SafeExit
        End If
        keywordPath = .SelectedItems(1)
    End With
    
    ' 開啟對照表，將 A 欄（關鍵字）與 B 欄（分類）讀入陣列（加快後面比對的速度）
    Set wbKeyword = Workbooks.Open(keywordPath, ReadOnly:=True)
    Set wsKeyword = wbKeyword.Sheets(1)
    keywordLastRow = wsKeyword.Cells(wsKeyword.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
    
    ' 確保對照表有資料才讀取
    If keywordLastRow >= 2 Then
        keywordArr = wsKeyword.Range("A2:B" & keywordLastRow).Value
    End If
    wbKeyword.Close SaveChanges:=False ' 讀完立即關閉，不佔用檔案
    
    '=================================================
    ' 3. 讓使用者選擇多個 Excel 信用卡帳單檔案
    '=================================================
    Set fd = Application.FileDialog(msoFileDialogFilePicker)
    With fd
        .Title = "【第二步】請選擇要匯入的信用卡帳單（可多選）"
        .AllowMultiSelect = True
        .Filters.Clear
        .Filters.Add "Excel 檔案", "*.xlsx; *.xlsm; *.xls"
        
        If .Show <> -1 Then
            MsgBox "已取消匯入作業。", vbInformation
            GoTo SafeExit
        End If
    End With
    
    '=================================================
    ' 4. 逐一開啟選取的檔案、解析檔名、接續匯入資料
    '=================================================
    For Each selectedFile In fd.SelectedItems
        
        ' ----- 步驟 A：解析檔名 -----
        fileName = Mid(selectedFile, InStrRev(selectedFile, "\") + 1)
        fileName = Left(fileName, InStrRev(fileName, ".") - 1)
        fileParts = Split(fileName, "_")
        
        bankName = fileParts(0)
        billMonth = CLng(fileParts(1) & fileParts(2)) 
        
        ' ----- 步驟 B：開啟來源檔案並複製明細 -----
        Set wbSource = Workbooks.Open(selectedFile, ReadOnly:=True)
        Set wsSource = wbSource.Sheets(1)
        
        sourceLastRow = wsSource.Cells(wsSource.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
        
        If sourceLastRow >= 2 Then
            ' 以 C 欄計算總表下一個空白行
            summaryNextRow = wsSummary.Cells(wsSummary.Rows.Count, 3).End(xlUp).Row + 1
            
            ' 複製外部明細（A2 到 E 欄）貼到總表的 C~G 欄
            Set copyRange = wsSource.Range("A2:E" & sourceLastRow)
            copyRange.Copy
            wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 3).PasteSpecial Paste:=xlPasteValues
            wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 3).PasteSpecial Paste:=xlPasteFormats
            Application.CutCopyMode = False
            
            ' ----- 步驟 C：填入 A、B 欄與設定靠右 -----
            importedRowsCount = sourceLastRow - 1
            
            With wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 1).Resize(importedRowsCount)
                .NumberFormat = "General"
                .Value = billMonth
            End With
            
            wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 2).Resize(importedRowsCount).Value = bankName
            
            wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 3).Resize(importedRowsCount).HorizontalAlignment = xlRight
            wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 4).Resize(importedRowsCount).HorizontalAlignment = xlRight
        End If
        
        wbSource.Close SaveChanges:=False
    Next selectedFile
    
    '=================================================
    ' 【第三階段新功能】5. 全面重新掃描總表進行自動分類
    '=================================================
    ' 如果有成功讀取到關鍵字對照表，才執行分類
    If Not IsEmpty(keywordArr) Then
        Dim totalLastRow As Long
        Dim i As Long
        Dim detailText As String
        Dim matchedCategory As String
        
        ' 找出目前總表一共有多少行資料（依 C 欄判斷）
        totalLastRow = wsSummary.Cells(wsSummary.Rows.Count, 3).End(xlUp).Row
        
        ' 從第 2 行（明細第一行）一路掃描到最後一行
        For i = 2 To totalLastRow
            detailText = CStr(wsSummary.Cells(i, 5).Value) ' 取得 E 欄的消費明細文字
            
            ' 呼叫下方的對照函數進行比對
            matchedCategory = GetCategoryByKeyword(detailText, keywordArr)
            
            ' 將比對出來的分類寫入 H 欄（消費分類）
            wsSummary.Cells(i, 8).Value = matchedCategory
        Next i
    End If
    
    '=================================================
    ' 6. 匯入與分類完成提示
    '=================================================
    MsgBox "所有帳單匯入成功！" & vbCrLf & _
           "已根據對照表自動完成 H 欄的消費分類項目。", vbInformation, "作業完成"

SafeExit:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.DisplayAlerts = True
    Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
    MsgBox "執行過程中發生錯誤: " & Err.Description, vbCritical, "錯誤提示"
    Resume SafeExit
End Sub

'====================================================
' 輔助函數：比對文字是否包含關鍵字，並回傳分類
'====================================================
Private Function GetCategoryByKeyword(detailText As String, keywordArr As Variant) As String
    Dim k As Long
    Dim currentKeyword As String
    
    ' 跑迴圈逐一檢查對照表陣列裡的每一筆關鍵字
    For k = 1 To UBound(keywordArr, 1)
        currentKeyword = CStr(keywordArr(k, 1)) ' 拿到對照表 A 欄的關鍵字
        
        ' 如果關鍵字不為空，且消費明細中「包含」了這個關鍵字
        If currentKeyword <> "" And InStr(1, detailText, currentKeyword, vbTextCompare) > 0 Then
            GetCategoryByKeyword = keywordArr(k, 2) ' 回傳對照表 B 欄的分類名稱
            Exit Function ' 找到第一個相符的就直接離開函數
        End If
    Next k
    
    ' 如果對照表整張翻完都沒有符合的關鍵字，就分類為「其他」
    GetCategoryByKeyword = "其他"
End Function

vba.title: 第四題：儀表板自動更新
vba.question: 如何將新匯入的資料與儀表板自動同步
vba.prompt:
當所有帳單匯入與分類都完成後，我希望我的「分析儀表板」工作表（包含數個樞紐分析表與關聯圖表）可以自動重整，以顯示最新彙整的數據。

請幫我將這個功能整合進前面主程式的最後一步。程式碼中需要先檢查「分析儀表板」工作表是否存在，如果存在，就自動尋找並重整該工作表上的所有樞紐分析表（PivotTables）與所有圖表（ChartObjects），不需要手動逐一重整。另外，請確保所有變數宣告（Dim）都嚴格集中在主程式的最頂端，避免編譯錯誤。
vba.code:
Option Explicit

'====================================================
' 主巨集：一鍵完成【上傳對照表 -> 匯入多帳單 -> 自動分類 -> 更新儀表板】
'====================================================
Sub FullAutomatedBillingSystem()
    '------------------------------------------------
    ' 【專家修正】所有變數一律嚴格規定在最頂端宣告，避免編譯錯誤
    '------------------------------------------------
    Dim fd As FileDialog
    Dim selectedFile As Variant
    Dim wbSource As Workbook
    Dim wsSource As Worksheet
    Dim wsSummary As Worksheet
    Dim wsDash As Worksheet
    
    ' 匯入與範圍計算變數
    Dim sourceLastRow As Long
    Dim summaryNextRow As Long
    Dim copyRange As Range
    Dim importedRowsCount As Long
    
    ' 檔名解析變數
    Dim fileName As String
    Dim fileParts As Variant
    Dim bankName As String
    Dim billMonth As Long
    
    ' 關鍵字對照表變數
    Dim keywordPath As String
    Dim wbKeyword As Workbook
    Dim wsKeyword As Worksheet
    Dim keywordArr As Variant
    Dim keywordLastRow As Long
    
    ' 自動分類掃描變數（已從 If 內部移至最頂端）
    Dim totalLastRow As Long
    Dim i As Long
    Dim detailText As String
    Dim matchedCategory As String
    
    ' 樞紐分析表與圖表變數
    Dim pt As PivotTable
    Dim chartObj As ChartObject
    
    '=================================================
    ' 效能優化：關閉螢幕更新與警告訊息，加快執行速度
    '=================================================
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.DisplayAlerts = False
    
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
    
    '=================================================
    ' 1. 檢查或建立「總表」工作表
    '=================================================
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsSummary = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("總表")
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler ' 恢復正常的錯誤處理
    
    If wsSummary Is Nothing Then
        Set wsSummary = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets.Add(Before:=ThisWorkbook.Worksheets(1))
        wsSummary.Name = "總表"
        wsSummary.Columns("A").NumberFormat = "General"
        wsSummary.Range("A1:H1").Value = Array( _
            "帳單月份", "帳單銀行", "刷卡日期", "入帳起息日", _
            "消費明細", "新台幣金額", "消費地區", "消費分類")
    End If
    
    '=================================================
    ' 2. 選擇並讀取「消費分類關鍵字對照表」
    '=================================================
    Set fd = Application.FileDialog(msoFileDialogFilePicker)
    With fd
        .Title = "【第一步】請選擇「消費分類關鍵字對照表」檔案"
        .Filters.Clear
        .Filters.Add "Excel 檔案", "*.xlsx; *.xlsm; *.xls"
        
        If .Show <> -1 Then
            MsgBox "已取消作業：未選取關鍵字對照表。", vbExclamation
            GoTo SafeExit
        End If
        keywordPath = .SelectedItems(1)
    End With
    
    Set wbKeyword = Workbooks.Open(keywordPath, ReadOnly:=True)
    Set wsKeyword = wbKeyword.Sheets(1)
    keywordLastRow = wsKeyword.Cells(wsKeyword.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
    
    If keywordLastRow >= 2 Then
        keywordArr = wsKeyword.Range("A2:B" & keywordLastRow).Value
    End If
    wbKeyword.Close SaveChanges:=False ' 讀完立即關閉
    
    '=================================================
    ' 3. 讓使用者多選信用卡帳單檔案
    '=================================================
    Set fd = Application.FileDialog(msoFileDialogFilePicker)
    With fd
        .Title = "【第二步】請選擇要匯入的信用卡帳單（可多選）"
        .AllowMultiSelect = True
        .Filters.Clear
        .Filters.Add "Excel 檔案", "*.xlsx; *.xlsm; *.xls"
        
        If .Show <> -1 Then
            MsgBox "已取消匯入作業。", vbInformation
            GoTo SafeExit
        End If
    End With
    
    '=================================================
    ' 4. 逐一開啟檔案、解析檔名、匯入 C~G 欄與填寫 A、B 欄
    '=================================================
    For Each selectedFile In fd.SelectedItems
        
        ' 解析檔名資訊
        fileName = Mid(selectedFile, InStrRev(selectedFile, "\") + 1)
        fileName = Left(fileName, InStrRev(fileName, ".") - 1)
        fileParts = Split(fileName, "_")
        
        bankName = fileParts(0)
        billMonth = CLng(fileParts(1) & fileParts(2)) ' 轉成真正的數字 (Long)
        
        ' 開啟外部帳單檔案
        Set wbSource = Workbooks.Open(selectedFile, ReadOnly:=True)
        Set wsSource = wbSource.Sheets(1)
        sourceLastRow = wsSource.Cells(wsSource.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
        
        ' 確保帳單有明細資料才複製
        If sourceLastRow >= 2 Then
            ' 動態計算總表下一個空白行 (以 C 欄為基準)
            summaryNextRow = wsSummary.Cells(wsSummary.Rows.Count, 3).End(xlUp).Row + 1
            
            ' 複製來源 A2:E 範圍，貼到總表的 C~G 欄
            Set copyRange = wsSource.Range("A2:E" & sourceLastRow)
            copyRange.Copy
            wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 3).PasteSpecial Paste:=xlPasteValues
            wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 3).PasteSpecial Paste:=xlPasteFormats
            Application.CutCopyMode = False
            
            importedRowsCount = sourceLastRow - 1
            
            ' A 欄轉成數字寫入 (General 格式)
            With wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 1).Resize(importedRowsCount)
                .NumberFormat = "General"
                .Value = billMonth
            End With
            
            ' B 欄寫入銀行名稱
            wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 2).Resize(importedRowsCount).Value = bankName
            
            ' C 欄（刷卡日期）與 D 欄（入帳日）新資料靠右對齊
            wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 3).Resize(importedRowsCount).HorizontalAlignment = xlRight
            wsSummary.Cells(summaryNextRow, 4).Resize(importedRowsCount).HorizontalAlignment = xlRight
        End If
        
        wbSource.Close SaveChanges:=False
    Next selectedFile
    
    '=================================================
    ' 5. 全面重新掃描總表進行自動分類（H欄）
    '=================================================
    ' 【專家修正】此處已無 Dim 變數，純邏輯執行，絕不跳錯
    If Not IsEmpty(keywordArr) Then
        totalLastRow = wsSummary.Cells(wsSummary.Rows.Count, 3).End(xlUp).Row
        
        For i = 2 To totalLastRow
            detailText = CStr(wsSummary.Cells(i, 5).Value) ' 抓取 E 欄明細
            matchedCategory = GetCategoryByKeyword(detailText, keywordArr) ' 進行模糊比對
            wsSummary.Cells(i, 8).Value = matchedCategory ' 填入 H 欄分類
        Next i
    End If
    
    '=================================================
    ' 6. 自動重新整理「分析儀表板」
    '=================================================
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsDash = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("分析儀表板")
    On Error GoTo ErrorHandler ' 恢復正常的錯誤處理
    
    If Not wsDash Is Nothing Then
        ' 重新整理該工作表內的所有樞紐分析表
        For Each pt In wsDash.PivotTables
            pt.PivotCache.Refresh
            pt.RefreshTable
        Next pt
        
        ' 重新整理該工作表內的所有統計圖表
        For Each chartObj In wsDash.ChartObjects
            chartObj.Chart.Refresh
        Next chartObj
    End If
    
    '=================================================
    ' 7. 大功告成提示
    '=================================================
    MsgBox "資料匯入、自動分類、樞紐分析與圖表更新全部完成！", vbInformation, "系統提示"

SafeExit:
    ' 恢復環境設定
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.DisplayAlerts = True
    Exit Sub

ErrorHandler:
    MsgBox "執行過程中發生錯誤: " & Err.Description, vbCritical, "錯誤提示"
    Resume SafeExit
End Sub

'====================================================
' 輔助函數：比對消費明細是否包含關鍵字
'====================================================
Private Function GetCategoryByKeyword(detailText As String, keywordArr As Variant) As String
    Dim k As Long
    Dim currentKeyword As String
    
    For k = 1 To UBound(keywordArr, 1)
        currentKeyword = CStr(keywordArr(k, 1))
        ' 模糊比對：只要明細包含關鍵字，就回傳分類
        If currentKeyword <> "" And InStr(1, detailText, currentKeyword, vbTextCompare) > 0 Then
            GetCategoryByKeyword = keywordArr(k, 2)
            Exit Function
        End If
    Next k
    GetCategoryByKeyword = "其他"
End Function

evolution.ours:
我要做一個VBA，用來彙整信用卡明細、分析樞紐及圖表

這個VBA可以同時上傳數個EXCEL檔，都是信用卡明細，明細標題按順序是刷卡日期、入帳起息日、消費明細、新台幣金額、消費地區

第二步會要上傳消費分類關鍵字對照表，有兩欄，按順序是關鍵字、消費分類，會用來跟信用卡明細中的"消費明細"作對照。

當消費明細的內容有提到關鍵字對照表，則歸類到該消費分類，舉例: 如果消費明細有"王品....."，而對照表的關鍵字有提到"王品"，則按照對照表的消費分類，放到其分類中。若對照表都沒有提到，可以顯示N/A

最後匯入總表，總表的標題按順序是: 帳單月份、帳單銀行、刷卡日期、入帳起息日、消費明細、新台幣金額、消費地區、消費分類，前面已經明確定義刷卡日期、入帳起息日、消費明細、新台幣金額、消費地區、消費分類。 至於帳單月份、帳單銀行是按照EXCEL上傳檔案時，信用卡明細的檔案名稱判斷，舉例: 當信用卡明細的檔案名稱為"A銀行_2026_01_帳單明細"，則該檔案的帳單月份都是2026/01/01，顯示格式為YYMM，而該檔案的帳單銀行都是A銀行，以此類推

先幫我產生完整的VBA 讓我進行測試 謝謝
evolution.ai:
請幫我撰寫一個 Excel VBA 巨集，功能如下：

【整體功能】
建立一個「信用卡帳單匯入系統」，可以一次匯入多個銀行帳單，依關鍵字自動分類，並更新樞紐分析與圖表。

【步驟1 — 建立總表工作表】
如果工作表「總表」不存在，請自動建立一張名為「總表」的工作表
欄位如下：A欄：帳單月份、B欄：帳單銀行、C欄：刷卡日期、D欄：入帳起息日、E欄：消費明細、F欄：新台幣金額、G欄：消費地區、H欄：消費分類

【步驟2 — 上傳分類關鍵字表】
跳出檔案選擇視窗，讓使用者選擇「消費分類關鍵字對照表」
格式：A欄 = 關鍵字，B欄 = 分類名稱

【步驟3 — 多選信用卡帳單】
跳出檔案選擇視窗，允許使用者一次選取多個信用卡帳單 Excel。檔名格式：銀行名稱_YYYY_MM.xlsx
請從檔名解析：帳單銀行、帳單月份 (yyyymm格式)

【步驟4 — 讀取與寫入帳單資料】
每個帳單格式：A:刷卡日期、B:入帳起息日、C:消費明細、D:金額、E:地區。從第2列讀取到最後一列，自動判斷重複資料避免重複匯入。分類若無符合對照表則歸類為「其他」。

【步驟5 — 更新儀表板】
若存在「分析儀表板」工作表，請自動更新全部 PivotTable 與圖表。
evolution.code:
Option Explicit

'====================================================
' 唯一主巨集（按一次執行全部）
'====================================================
Sub ImportCreditCardBills()

    Dim fd As FileDialog
    Dim keywordPath As String
    Dim selectedFile As Variant
    Dim wbSource As Workbook
    Dim wsSource As Worksheet
    Dim wsSummary As Worksheet
    Dim wsKeyword As Worksheet
    
    Dim lastRow As Long
    Dim outputRow As Long
    Dim i As Long
    Dim detailText As String
    Dim category As String
    Dim fileName As String
    Dim bankName As String
    Dim billMonth As Date
    
    Dim keywordArr As Variant
    Dim keywordLastRow As Long
    
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.DisplayAlerts = False
    
    On Error GoTo SafeExit
    
    '=================================================
    ' 建立或取得總表
    '=================================================
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsSummary = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("總表")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If wsSummary Is Nothing Then
        Set wsSummary = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets.Add
        wsSummary.Name = "總表"
        wsSummary.Range("A1:H1").Value = Array( _
            "帳單月份", "帳單銀行", "刷卡日期", "入帳起息日", _
            "消費明細", "新台幣金額", "消費地區", "消費分類")
    End If
    
    outputRow = wsSummary.Cells(wsSummary.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1
    
    '=================================================
    ' 上傳關鍵字對照表
    '=================================================
    Set fd = Application.FileDialog(msoFileDialogFilePicker)
    With fd
        .Title = "請選擇最新消費分類關鍵字對照表"
        .Filters.Clear
        .Filters.Add "Excel Files", "*.xlsx; *.xlsm; *.xls"
        
        If .Show <> -1 Then GoTo SafeExit
        keywordPath = .SelectedItems(1)
    End With
    
    Set wbSource = Workbooks.Open(keywordPath)
    Set wsKeyword = wbSource.Sheets(1)
    
    keywordLastRow = wsKeyword.Cells(wsKeyword.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
    keywordArr = wsKeyword.Range("A2:B" & keywordLastRow).Value
    
    wbSource.Close False
    
    '=================================================
    ' 多選信用卡帳單
    '=================================================
    Set fd = Application.FileDialog(msoFileDialogFilePicker)
    With fd
        .Title = "請選擇新增信用卡帳單（可多選）"
        .AllowMultiSelect = True
        .Filters.Clear
        .Filters.Add "Excel Files", "*.xlsx; *.xlsm; *.xls"
        
        If .Show <> -1 Then GoTo SafeExit
        
        For Each selectedFile In .SelectedItems
            
            fileName = Mid(selectedFile, InStrRev(selectedFile, "\") + 1)
            
            bankName = Split(fileName, "_")(0)
            billMonth = DateSerial( _
                CLng(Split(fileName, "_")(1)), _
                CLng(Split(fileName, "_")(2)), 1)
            
            Set wbSource = Workbooks.Open(selectedFile)
            Set wsSource = wbSource.Sheets(1)
            
            lastRow = wsSource.Cells(wsSource.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
            
            For i = 2 To lastRow
                
                detailText = CStr(wsSource.Cells(i, 3).Value)
                category = GetCategory(detailText, keywordArr)
                
                If Not IsDuplicate(wsSummary, billMonth, bankName, _
                    wsSource.Cells(i, 1).Value, detailText, _
                    wsSource.Cells(i, 4).Value) Then
                    
                    wsSummary.Cells(outputRow, 1).Value = billMonth
                    wsSummary.Cells(outputRow, 1).NumberFormat = "yyyymm"
                    wsSummary.Cells(outputRow, 2).Value = bankName
                    wsSummary.Cells(outputRow, 3).Value = wsSource.Cells(i, 1).Value
                    wsSummary.Cells(outputRow, 4).Value = wsSource.Cells(i, 2).Value
                    wsSummary.Cells(outputRow, 5).Value = detailText
                    wsSummary.Cells(outputRow, 6).Value = wsSource.Cells(i, 4).Value
                    wsSummary.Cells(outputRow, 7).Value = wsSource.Cells(i, 5).Value
                    wsSummary.Cells(outputRow, 8).Value = category
                    
                    outputRow = outputRow + 1
                End If
                
            Next i
            
            wbSource.Close False
        Next selectedFile
    End With
    
    '=================================================
    ' 重跑全部分類
    '=================================================
    ReClassifyAll wsSummary, keywordArr
    
    '=================================================
    ' 更新既有儀表板（樞紐+圖表）
    '=================================================
    RefreshDashboard
    
    MsgBox "資料匯入、分類、樞紐、圖表更新完成！"

SafeExit:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.DisplayAlerts = True

End Sub


'====================================================
' 以下全部改 Private，不顯示在巨集清單
'====================================================
Private Function GetCategory(detailText As String, keywordArr As Variant) As String
    Dim i As Long
    
    For i = 1 To UBound(keywordArr, 1)
        If InStr(1, detailText, keywordArr(i, 1), vbTextCompare) > 0 Then
            GetCategory = keywordArr(i, 2)
            Exit Function
        End If
    Next i
    
    GetCategory = "其他"
End Function


Private Function IsDuplicate(ws As Worksheet, billMonth As Date, bankName As String, _
    cardDate As Variant, detailText As String, amount As Variant) As Boolean
    
    Dim lastRow As Long
    Dim i As Long
    
    lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
    
    For i = 2 To lastRow
        If ws.Cells(i, 1).Value = billMonth _
           And ws.Cells(i, 2).Value = bankName _
           And ws.Cells(i, 3).Value = cardDate _
           And ws.Cells(i, 5).Value = detailText _
           And ws.Cells(i, 6).Value = amount Then
           
           IsDuplicate = True
           Exit Function
        End If
    Next i
    
    IsDuplicate = False
End Function


Private Sub ReClassifyAll(wsSummary As Worksheet, keywordArr As Variant)
    Dim lastRow As Long
    Dim i As Long
    
    lastRow = wsSummary.Cells(wsSummary.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
    
    For i = 2 To lastRow
        wsSummary.Cells(i, 8).Value = GetCategory(wsSummary.Cells(i, 5).Value, keywordArr)
    Next i
End Sub


Private Sub RefreshDashboard()
    Dim wsDash As Worksheet
    Dim pt As PivotTable
    Dim chartObj As ChartObject
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsDash = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("分析儀表板")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If wsDash Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
    
    For Each pt In wsDash.PivotTables
        pt.PivotCache.Refresh
        pt.RefreshTable
    Next pt
    
    For Each chartObj In wsDash.ChartObjects
        chartObj.Chart.Refresh
    Next chartObj
End Sub

evolution.ours: 大致沒問題 有細節需要修改。圖表分析和樞紐分析幫我放在同一個SHEET，原本提到的，當沒有在對照表中的，顯示"N/A"，幫我改成"其他"。由於我之後會加入更多新的信用卡明細，如果我定期都會上傳新的對照表 and 添加新的信用卡明細，可以把這個需求加入到現在的VBA嗎？
已調整好分析儀表板的圖片和樞紐，所以不用每次都重新產生樞紐及圖片。幫我更新圖表及樞紐即可，給我完整的VBA程式，謝謝！

vibe.title: 第一題：信用卡消費彙整系統
vibe.question: 使用 AI 協作開發信用卡消費彙整系統 (Cursor / v0)
vibe.prompt:
請使用 AI 協作工具 (Cursor / v0) 幫我設計一個信用卡消費彙整系統網頁版。我希望能有一個精美、簡約的儀表板介面：
1. 可以上傳一個 Excel/CSV 消費分類對照表。
2. 支援拖曳上傳多張不同銀行的信用卡帳單 Excel 檔案。
3. 系統自動在前端進行檔名解析（抓出銀行名稱和月份），並以模糊比對自動分類。
4. 網頁上有樞紐分析表與圓餅圖、長條圖，能動態顯示不同月份、不同銀行的消費比例。
請提供 HTML、CSS 與 JavaScript 完整檔案。

vibe.title: 第二題：自動化測試巨集
vibe.question: 為信用卡系統程式碼撰寫測試 Prompt 與測試巨集
vibe.prompt:
我目前有一段 VBA 彙整信用卡帳單的程式碼。請幫我針對這段程式碼撰寫測試 Prompt，要求 AI 產生對應的測試巨集，可以自動生成模擬的來源帳單資料與關鍵字對照表，並驗證以下邊界條件：
1. 當消費金額為 0 或負數時的處理。
2. 當消費明細中包含特殊字元或空白時的模糊匹配。
3. 驗證重複資料是否確實被排除匯入。
vibe.code:
Sub RunUnitTestForImport()
    ' 自動生成測試資料並驗證匯入功能
    Dim wsTest As Worksheet
    Set wsTest = Worksheets.Add
    wsTest.Name = "Test_Source"
    
    ' 填入測試資料 (包含負數與特殊字元)
    wsTest.Range("A1:E1").Value = Array("刷卡日期", "入帳起息日", "消費明細", "金額", "地區")
    wsTest.Range("A2:E2").Value = Array(#6/25/2026#, #6/26/2026#, "王品牛排  ", -1500, "台北")
    
    ' 執行測試
    Dim category As String
    Dim testArr(1 To 1, 1 To 2) As Variant
    testArr(1, 1) = "王品"
    testArr(1, 2) = "餐飲"
    
    category = GetCategory("王品牛排  ", testArr)
    
    ' 驗證結果
    If category = "餐飲" Then
        MsgBox "測試通過：特殊字元與去空白模糊匹配成功！", vbInformation
    Else
        MsgBox "測試失敗：分類不符合預期。", vbCritical
    End If
End Sub

hints.fullCode:
Option Explicit

'====================================================
' 唯一主巨集（按一次執行全部）
'====================================================
Sub ImportCreditCardBills()

    Dim fd As FileDialog
    Dim keywordPath As String
    Dim selectedFile As Variant
    Dim wbSource As Workbook
    Dim wsSource As Worksheet
    Dim wsSummary As Worksheet
    Dim wsKeyword As Worksheet
    
    Dim lastRow As Long
    Dim outputRow As Long
    Dim i As Long
    Dim detailText As String
    Dim category As String
    Dim fileName As String
    Dim bankName As String
    Dim billMonth As Date
    
    Dim keywordArr As Variant
    Dim keywordLastRow As Long
    
    Application.ScreenUpdating = False
    Application.DisplayAlerts = False
    
    On Error GoTo SafeExit
    
    '=================================================
    ' 建立或取得總表
    '=================================================
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsSummary = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("總表")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If wsSummary Is Nothing Then
        Set wsSummary = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets.Add
        wsSummary.Name = "總表"
        wsSummary.Range("A1:H1").Value = Array( _
            "帳單月份", "帳單銀行", "刷卡日期", "入帳起息日", _
            "消費明細", "新台幣金額", "消費地區", "消費分類")
    End If
    
    outputRow = wsSummary.Cells(wsSummary.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row + 1
    
    '=================================================
    ' 上傳關鍵字對照表
    '=================================================
    Set fd = Application.FileDialog(msoFileDialogFilePicker)
    With fd
        .Title = "請選擇最新消費分類關鍵字對照表"
        .Filters.Clear
        .Filters.Add "Excel Files", "*.xlsx; *.xlsm; *.xls"
        
        If .Show <> -1 Then GoTo SafeExit
        keywordPath = .SelectedItems(1)
    End With
    
    Set wbSource = Workbooks.Open(keywordPath)
    Set wsKeyword = wbSource.Sheets(1)
    
    keywordLastRow = wsKeyword.Cells(wsKeyword.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
    keywordArr = wsKeyword.Range("A2:B" & keywordLastRow).Value
    
    wbSource.Close False
    
    '=================================================
    ' 多選信用卡帳單
    '=================================================
    Set fd = Application.FileDialog(msoFileDialogFilePicker)
    With fd
        .Title = "請選擇新增信用卡帳單（可多選）"
        .AllowMultiSelect = True
        .Filters.Clear
        .Filters.Add "Excel Files", "*.xlsx; *.xlsm; *.xls"
        
        If .Show <> -1 Then GoTo SafeExit
        
        For Each selectedFile In .SelectedItems
            
            fileName = Mid(selectedFile, InStrRev(selectedFile, "\") + 1)
            
            bankName = Split(fileName, "_")(0)
            billMonth = DateSerial( _
                CLng(Split(fileName, "_")(1)), _
                CLng(Split(fileName, "_")(2)), 1)
            
            Set wbSource = Workbooks.Open(selectedFile)
            Set wsSource = wbSource.Sheets(1)
            
            lastRow = wsSource.Cells(wsSource.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
            
            For i = 2 To lastRow
                
                detailText = CStr(wsSource.Cells(i, 3).Value)
                category = GetCategory(detailText, keywordArr)
                
                If Not IsDuplicate(wsSummary, billMonth, bankName, _
                    wsSource.Cells(i, 1).Value, detailText, _
                    wsSource.Cells(i, 4).Value) Then
                    
                    wsSummary.Cells(outputRow, 1).Value = billMonth
                    wsSummary.Cells(outputRow, 1).NumberFormat = "yyyymm"
                    wsSummary.Cells(outputRow, 2).Value = bankName
                    wsSummary.Cells(outputRow, 3).Value = wsSource.Cells(i, 1).Value
                    wsSummary.Cells(outputRow, 4).Value = wsSource.Cells(i, 2).Value
                    wsSummary.Cells(outputRow, 5).Value = detailText
                    wsSummary.Cells(outputRow, 6).Value = wsSource.Cells(i, 4).Value
                    wsSummary.Cells(outputRow, 7).Value = wsSource.Cells(i, 5).Value
                    wsSummary.Cells(outputRow, 8).Value = category
                    
                    outputRow = outputRow + 1
                End If
                
            Next i
            
            wbSource.Close False
        Next selectedFile
    End With
    
    '=================================================
    ' 重跑全部分類
    '=================================================
    ReClassifyAll wsSummary, keywordArr
    
    '=================================================
    ' 更新既有儀表板（樞紐+圖表）
    '=================================================
    RefreshDashboard
    
    MsgBox "資料匯入、分類、樞紐、圖表更新完成！"

SafeExit:
    Application.ScreenUpdating = True
    Application.DisplayAlerts = True

End Sub


'====================================================
' 以下全部改 Private，不顯示在巨集清單
'====================================================
Private Function GetCategory(detailText As String, keywordArr As Variant) As String
    Dim i As Long
    
    For i = 1 To UBound(keywordArr, 1)
        If InStr(1, detailText, keywordArr(i, 1), vbTextCompare) > 0 Then
            GetCategory = keywordArr(i, 2)
            Exit Function
        End If
    Next i
    
    GetCategory = "其他"
End Function


Private Function IsDuplicate(ws As Worksheet, billMonth As Date, bankName As String, _
    cardDate As Variant, detailText As String, amount As Variant) As Boolean
    
    Dim lastRow As Long
    Dim i As Long
    
    lastRow = ws.Cells(ws.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
    
    For i = 2 To lastRow
        If ws.Cells(i, 1).Value = billMonth _
           And ws.Cells(i, 2).Value = bankName _
           And ws.Cells(i, 3).Value = cardDate _
           And ws.Cells(i, 5).Value = detailText _
           And ws.Cells(i, 6).Value = amount Then
           
           IsDuplicate = True
           Exit Function
        End If
    Next i
    
    IsDuplicate = False
End Function


Private Sub ReClassifyAll(wsSummary As Worksheet, keywordArr As Variant)
    Dim lastRow As Long
    Dim i As Long
    
    lastRow = wsSummary.Cells(wsSummary.Rows.Count, 1).End(xlUp).Row
    
    For i = 2 To lastRow
        wsSummary.Cells(i, 8).Value = GetCategory(wsSummary.Cells(i, 5).Value, keywordArr)
    Next i
End Sub


Private Sub RefreshDashboard()
    Dim wsDash As Worksheet
    Dim pt As PivotTable
    Dim chartObj As ChartObject
    
    On Error Resume Next
    Set wsDash = ThisWorkbook.Worksheets("分析儀表板")
    On Error GoTo 0
    
    If wsDash Is Nothing Then Exit Sub
    
    For Each pt In wsDash.PivotTables
        pt.PivotCache.Refresh
        pt.RefreshTable
    Next pt
    
    For Each chartObj In wsDash.ChartObjects
        chartObj.Chart.Refresh
    Next chartObj
End Sub
